title: Velvety Caramelized Greek Fennel Soup
description: A silky, plantbased soup that layers caramelized fennel with aromatic Greek herbs for a lazySunday comfort dish.

ingredients.name: fennel bulb
ingredients.notes: trimmed, stem removed, diced into ½‑inch cubes

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced fennel, carrots, and onion. Cook, stirring, until the vegetables begin to soften and the fennel starts to turn translucent, about 5‑7 minutes.
Sprinkle the sugar over the vegetables, stir to coat, then let the mixture caramelize for 3‑4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in the vegetable broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes until the vegetables are very tender.
Stir in the coconut milk, dried oregano, lemon zest, and lemon juice. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes to meld the flavors.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until silky smooth (or transfer in batches to a blender, then return to the pot).
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with a sprinkle of fresh dill or parsley if desired.
